metadata.description: Kanban board for Trade-In Valuation Calculator with Configurable Margins. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.epicTitle: Trade-In Valuation Calculator with Configurable Margins
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Trade-In Valuation Calculator with Configurable Margins
tasks.description: Create trade-in valuation calculator that uses market prices from APIs and applies configurable margin percentages to calculate trade-in offers.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want to calculate trade-in values with configurable margins so that I can offer fair prices while maintaining profitable margins.
acceptanceCriteria: Given market price is fetched, when calculating trade-in value, then system applies configured margin percentage (e.g., 50% of market price)
Given margin configuration, when store owner sets margin percentage, then margin is saved and used for all future calculations
Given different conditions, when calculating trade-in value, then system uses condition-specific market price and applies margin
Given margin calculation, when trade-in value is calculated, then breakdown is shown: market price, margin %, and final offer
Given multiple items, when calculating batch trade-in, then system calculates total value for all items
Given margin settings, when viewed, then store owner can set different margins for games vs. cards if desired
tasks.businessValue: Automates trade-in pricing calculations, reducing manual work and ensuring consistent, profitable margins.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create margin configuration in database. Implement calculation logic. Support different margins for different item types. Store calculation history for audit.
successMetrics: Calculation accuracy: 100% of calculations use correct margin formulas
Margin configuration usage: 80%+ of stores configure custom margins
businessRules: Default margin is 50% of market price (configurable)
Margin can be set per item type (games, cards) or globally
Margin percentage must be between 10% and 90%
Calculation breakdown must be visible to user
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
